description: Manages evaluation runs, records evaluation results, and links results to work items. Defines the canonical evaluation result envelope used across the platform.
forbidden_responsibilities: Defining artifact models — those are owned by shared.artifact_models
Defining identifier schemes — those are owned by shared.ids
Workflow execution — that belongs to orchestration.pipeline
Domain-specific evaluation logic — that belongs to the relevant domain_module
Readiness state definitions — those are owned by shared.readiness
